/usr/lib64/ccache/cc -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/indigo_core.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libindigo_core.so -o libindigo_core.so CMakeFiles/indigo_core.dir/manager.c.o CMakeFiles/indigo_core.dir/net_io.c.o CMakeFiles/indigo_core.dir/packet_handler.c.o CMakeFiles/indigo_core.dir/net_monitor.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/constantin/Projects/indigo/out/Debug/src/libs/utilities/event_flags:/home/constantin/Projects/indigo/out/Debug/src/libs/utilities/queue:/home/constantin/Projects/indigo/out/Debug/src/libs/utilities/mempool:/home/constantin/Projects/indigo/out/Debug/src/libs/utilities/crypto:/home/constantin/Projects/indigo/out/Debug/src/libs/utilities/hash_table:/home/constantin/Projects/indigo/out/Debug/src/libs/utilities/binary_tree:/home/constantin/Projects/indigo/out/Debug/src/libs/utilities/config -lws2_32 -lIPHLPAPI ../utilities/event_flags/libevent_flags.so ../utilities/queue/libqueue.so -lsodium ../utilities/mempool/libmempool.so ../utilities/crypto/libcrypto_utils.so ../utilities/hash_table/liblht.so ../utilities/binary_tree/libbinary_tree.so ../utilities/config/libconfig.so /usr/lib64/libglib-2.0.so
